set.syntax: {% set name = value %} | {% set name %}...{% endset %}
set.description: Assign a value to a variable within the template. Supports both single-line assignment and block assignment.
set.caveat: Assignments are scoped to the current context. Block assignments capture rendered text, not expressions.

for.syntax: {% for target in iterable %}...{% else %}...{% endfor %}
for.description: Iterate over an iterable (such as a list, tuple, or dict) and render the block for each item.
for.caveat: Loop variables are only available inside the loop body.
